name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
ℹ️ How to use HabitStreak:

Tap /start to open the menu, then pick what you want from the buttons.

• 📋 My habits — view and manage your habits
• ✅ Check in — mark today’s habits as done
• ➕ Add habit — create a new habit to track

I’ll remind you each day to check in. Keep your streak going!

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
